# GreeneDesk – Multi-Sport Operations Platform

## What is GreeneDesk?
GreeneDesk is a multi-sport operations platform built in Australia. It does not replace existing management systems — it integrates with them and powers scheduling, engagement, assessments, and program delivery.

## Who is GreeneDesk for?
- Council leisure centres and recreation facilities
- Aquatic centres and swim schools
- Wellness, rehab, and active ageing programs
- Coaching academies and sports facilities
- Multi-sport centres (gymnastics, martial arts, tennis, badminton)

GreeneDesk is NOT primarily for private gyms. It serves organisations managing complex, multi-service operations.

## Products

### FitDesk
Operations platform for gyms, leisure centres, wellness facilities, and rehab programs. Covers scheduling, assessments, engagement, exercise programming, and trainer workflows. Integrates with existing management systems like PerfectGym.

### SwimDesk
Swim school management platform. Parent booking, rescheduling, absence management, skills tracking, digital certificates, instructor tools, and school swimming program management.

### SportDesk
Squad and competitive sports management. Heat creation, time tracking, qualifying benchmarks, wet and dry workout tracking, athlete progression, and parent engagement.

### School Programs
End-to-end management of school swimming and sports programs. Bulk student intake, poolside assessments, attendance tracking, and automated reporting and certificates.

### Squads
Competitive squad management for swimming, athletics, and other sports. Performance tracking, training plans, and athlete progression.

## Key Differentiators
- Works alongside existing systems (PerfectGym, Envibe, others) — no rip-and-replace
- Deep scheduling and trainer/instructor workflows
- Digital assessments and program tracking
- Parent, member, and trainer engagement apps
- All data hosted exclusively in Sydney, Australia (AWS ap-southeast-2)
- Multi-sport capability across a single platform

## Core Platform Capabilities
- Scheduling and roster management
- Communication (SMS, email, WhatsApp)
- Payments and billing
- Analytics and reporting
- Teacher and trainer tools
- Parent and member portal
- Manager and CEO dashboards

## Company Information
- Company: GreeneDesk
- Location: VIC, Australia
- Phone: 1300 181 665
- Email: anita.w@greenedesk.com
- Support: support@greenedesk.com
- Website: https://www.greenedesk.com
- Data hosting: AWS Sydney (ap-southeast-2), Australia
